pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure bytecode compatibility with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against the default or previously configured JDK version (likely 17), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime issues if specific 21 APIs are used, and not meeting the migration goal of targeting JDK 21.
